output.final_deliverable:
Extracted facts (from the provided visit results):

1) Exact H1 text from https://example.com
   - Label: H1
   - Value: "Example Domain"
   - Source (citation): https://example.com

2) Exact external link found on https://example.com and its domain
   - Label: External link (full URL)
   - Value: https://iana.org/domains/example
   - Label: External link domain (exact)
   - Value: iana.org
   - Source (citation): https://example.com

3) One URL citation for each visited page (listed in order requested)
   1. https://example.com
   2. https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved

Verification snippet for the IANA page (from visit result):
   - H1 / title: "IANA-managed Reserved Domains"
   - Source (citation): https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved

Notes: All values above are taken directly from the provided visit results (h1_text, links, and source_url fields). No additional web content was used.
output.action_summary: I visited the two pages per the merged visit results and extracted: (1) the exact H1 from example.com: "Example Domain"; (2) the exact external link on example.com (https://iana.org/domains/example) and its domain (iana.org); and (3) one URL citation for each visited page: https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. All items are cited to the visited URLs shown above.

4478c67d-0169-4cf1-8d6a-ae56cd75af4c.title: Visit https://example.com and extract H1, external link domain, and citation

details.intent: Load the exact page at https://example.com and extract (1) the exact H1 text (preserve exact characters/whitespace), (2) the exact external link URL found on the page and its domain, and (3) a canonical citation URL for the page (the visited URL). This directly satisfies the mandate’s three required outputs for example.com.
details.extraction_plan: 1) Fetch the full HTML of https://example.com. 2) Extract the first <h1> element's exact inner text without normalization. 3) Find anchor (<a>) elements that point to external domains (href not same-origin); if multiple, prefer the visible link labeled (e.g. 'Learn more') or the first external link in document order. 4) Capture the anchor's exact href as external_link_full_url and parse its hostname exactly as external_link_domain. 5) Set page_citation_url to the exact visited URL string. 6) Include small raw HTML snippets around the <h1> and the chosen <a> tag to support verification.
details.verification_steps: Return the extracted fields plus the raw HTML snippets for the <h1> and the anchor tag. Verify external_link_domain equals the hostname parsed from external_link_full_url. Do not guess — use the exact href found on the page.
details.goal: Visit https://example.com and extract H1, external link domain, and citation
details.original_goal: Visit https://example.com and extract H1, external link domain, and citation
details.parent_goal: Visit https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Return: (1) the exact H1 text from example.com, (2) the exact domain of the external link from example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page.

This directly satisfies the mandate’s three required outputs for example.com.

f3ab3402-d323-4b92-aa3d-07de8386066d.title: Visit https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved and capture a citation URL

details.intent: Load the specific IANA 'Reserved Domains' page and produce a single URL citation for that visited page and a short verification snippet (title or first heading/snippet). This satisfies the mandate’s requirement for one URL citation for each visited page.
details.extraction_plan: 1) Fetch the full HTML of https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. 2) Record the visited URL exactly as page_citation_url. 3) Extract a short verification snippet: prefer the first H1 text; if none, capture the page <title> or first 200 characters of visible text. 4) Return the URL and the snippet for verification.
details.verification_steps: Return the exact visited URL and the extracted verification snippet (exact text). Include a small HTML snippet around the extracted heading/text to confirm identity.
details.goal: Visit https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved and capture a citation URL
details.original_goal: Visit https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved and capture a citation URL

1a17115a-2743-4bbe-aaa7-5537b1112e52.title: Save extracted findings to memory (after visits)

details.intent: Persist the outputs from the two visit nodes into memory under a clear namespace so future steps can reference exact extracted values (H1 text, external link URL and domain, and both page citation URLs). This node must run after both visit actions to collect their outputs.
details.justification: Storing these exact extracted values ensures reproducibility and allows later steps to reference the canonical H1 and link domain without re-scraping. This reduces uncertainty by preserving the exact strings retrieved.
details.verification_steps: After write, return a confirmation object listing the fields written and a memory id or success boolean. If any required input is missing, return an explicit error indicating which field was absent.
details.goal: Save extracted findings to memory (after visits)
details.original_goal: Save extracted findings to memory (after visits)
